title: Reactables
description: UI and world effects that react to gameplay events.
body:
# Reactables

**UI and world effects that react to gameplay events.**

Reactables makes Minecraft feel more alive by adding subtle reactions to everyday gameplay moments. Every hit, every fall, every level up now has a physical response. Designed for modpacks.

## Effects
- Hotbar shakes when you take damage
- Screen edges flash red on hit
- Hotbar moves dynamically when sprinting
- Hotbar pulses at low health
- Screen darkens at low health
- Hotbar lifts when falling
- Hotbar bounces when eating
- XP bar flashes on level up

## Configuration
Every effect can be toggled individually in the config screen. Open it with R (configurable) or through Mod Menu.

## Compatibility
- Works with Sodium and Iris
- Client-side only, no server install needed
- Fabric only
